component.name: Yoohoo!
component.summary: Universal Hoyoverse Game Launcher for Linux

description.p: This app is in Alpha! Please use with caution, and expect bugs/missing features
Yoohoo! is a Universal Hoyoverse Game Launcher for x64 Linux hosts using Wine and DXVK.
The application meant to replace the individual launchers created by an-anime-team, as work on a unified launcher has stalled
This app works with the following games:
All features available in the HoyoPlay launcher on Windows (i.e. preinstall) will be/are implemented in this application
